Card1.Round1: first basket is longer than the rest, shaped in a rectangle, top of it circular, one handle, long
Card1.Round2: really wide, with no lid and handle, looks beat up, looks like someone took a bite out of right side
Card1.Round3: really wide, looks like baby bath, bite mark in side of it
Card1.Round4: looks like bathtub with bite out of side of it

Card2.Round1: not wide, really big handle, really high handle, woven together really tightly, green in handle, no lid, brown woven stuff, then red woven into it
Card2.Round2: really high handle, short, with red weaving through it
Card2.Round3: really high handle, short, red and green woven into it
Card2.Round4: really high handle, really small, with red

Card3.Round1: handle, spaces in between weavings, wide, not tight, looks like black thing inside of it
Card3.Round2: large holes in top of it, short, handle, you can stick your finger through one of the holes in top, in weavings, darker in its color
Card3.Round3: medium sized handle, holes in top where you could stick your finger through, medium sized basket, flat bottom, black inside
Card3.Round4: black base, holes in top with medium size handle

Card4.Round1: no handle, very wide, it can probably hold a lot of things, woven tightly, border around top of it, got an edge to it, no design, you couldn't stick your finger through one of the weavings
Card4.Round3: wide, deep, no handle, no lid, tight weaving
Card4.Round4: big, wide, no handle, no lid, tight weaving

Card5.Round1: short, with no handle, red ribbon tied through it, woven through top
Card5.Round2: short, no handle, no lid, red ribbon through it
Card5.Round3: short, you could stick your finger through holes in it, got red ribbon
Card5.Round4: short, holes in top, red ribbon through top

Card6.Round1: looks Mexican in its design, very tightly woven, but there's a hole right between top and bottom, right in center, where's there's zig-zag, green to backing, triangular, looks like salsa dish

Card7.Round1: really big, biggest one with lid, little knobby thing on top
Card7.Round2: really big, lid, two short handles on either side, little knob on top
Card7.Round3: really big, with small handles on sides, little knob on top
Card7.Round4: big, deep, with short handles and knob on top

Card8.Round1: looks like purse, bottom shaped like triangle, handle

Card9.Round1: handle, wider than other one with flat lid, more round, shorter
Card9.Round2: square handle on top, round base, round lid, really tightly woven
Card9.Round3: there's no holes in weaving, you could stick your finger through holes in it, red ribbon
Card9.Round4: round bottom, flat lid, square handle

Card10.Round3: deep, lid, handle, almost square, weavings are really tight on bottom
Card10.Round4: big, deep, square handle, lid, tight weaving
